title: orchis angustifolia subsp. friesii
intro: Orchis angustifolia subsp. friesii, also known as the narrow-leaved orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis angustifolia subsp. friesii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to help relieve coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are then used to treat various ailments.
